Your AI financial coach
for the student life

SakhiFi is an AI-powered financial coach built for Indian students — helping you budget smarter, avoid scams, build savings habits, and achieve financial independence.

Sign up freeLog inSee How It Works
🔒 Privacy-First Architecture🛡️ Scam Detection Built-In🇮🇳 Made for India

Privacy Protected

The Problem

Students are financially blind — and it's costing them

Indian students face a financial literacy crisis. No tools, no education, no safety nets — just scams, overspending, and stress.

74%

No Money Left by Month-End

74% of Indian students run out of their allowance before the month ends, with no idea where it went.

₹3.2K Cr

Targeted by Financial Scams

Students lose ₹3,200 Cr+ annually to fraud — fake UPI links, job scams, scholarship traps.

0%

Zero Financial Education

Schools don't teach budgeting, SIPs, credit scores, or taxes. Most students enter college financially illiterate.

???

No One to Ask

Financial questions feel embarrassing. There's no judgment-free, student-friendly resource that speaks your language.

The Solution

Meet Sakhi — your AI financial companion

Sakhi isn't a generic budgeting app. She's an intelligent financial coach who understands your life as an Indian student — your allowance, your goals, your risks, your language.

🧠

Intelligent, Not Formulaic

Sakhi learns your unique financial patterns and adapts her advice to your actual life — not a spreadsheet template.

💬

Conversational, Not Clinical

Ask anything in plain language. 'Can I afford a new phone?' 'Is this link safe?' 'What's a SIP?' Sakhi answers clearly.

Core AI Experience
🛡️

Protective, Not Passive

Sakhi actively watches for scam patterns, risky financial decisions, and sends proactive alerts before you lose money.

AI Budgeting

A budget that actually understands your life

Sakhi doesn't give you a generic 50-30-20 rule. She builds a plan around your actual spending, goals, and habits — then guides you through it with real-time nudges.

March Budget

₹12,500 total
🍕Food & Dining₹4,500 / ₹6,000
🚌Transport₹1,200 / ₹2,000
📚Books & Supplies₹800 / ₹1,500
🎬Entertainment₹2,200 / ₹2,500
📱Subscriptions₹500 / ₹500
✨

Sakhi's Insights

You've spent 75% of your food budget with 10 days left. Consider cooking at home this weekend! 🍳

Great news! You're ₹800 under budget on transport this month. Transfer to your savings goal? 🎯

Your entertainment spending is trending 15% lower than last month. Keep it up! 📈

Insights update in real-time based on your spending

Everything You Need

Everything you need to win at money

01
💰

AI Budgeting Coach

Sakhi learns your spending patterns and gives you a personalized monthly plan — not generic advice, but guidance built around your actual life.

02
🛡️

Scam Shield

AI-powered detection of financial scams targeting students. Get real-time alerts before you click, transfer, or trust the wrong person.

03
🎯

Goal Planning

From emergency funds to that semester abroad — Sakhi builds an achievable savings plan with milestone tracking and gentle nudges.

04
🤔

"Can I Afford This?"

Ask Sakhi before any purchase. Get an instant, honest answer based on your budget, goals, and financial health — not judgment, just clarity.

05
📚

Financial Literacy

Learn about credit scores, insurance, SIPs, and taxes through bite-sized, real-life lessons — not textbook theory.

06
🔒

Women-First Privacy

Your financial data is never sold. Built with end-to-end encryption, no third-party data sharing, and a privacy-first architecture.

07
💸

Cashback & Savings Tips

Sakhi finds cashback, discounts, and savings opportunities you're missing every day.

08
💼

AI Income Recommender

Tell Sakhi your skills and get personalized income opportunities — freelance, part-time, or side hustles.

09
🔔

Smart Nudges

Timely reminders, celebratory milestones, and gentle pushbacks when you're about to overspend.

10
🌸

Period Wellness Companion

Tracks your cycle, understands your cravings, and recommends healthy budget-friendly treats — self-care fully planned, guilt-free.

🆕 New Feature
11
🩺

Health Concern Agent

Preventive checkup reminders, medical expense forecasts, and a personalised health-finance plan — stay healthy, stay wealthy.

🆕 New Feature
12
📈

AI Investment Advisor

SIP calculator, stock picks, mutual fund guidance — Warren Buffett-level wisdom, simplified for every student's budget.

🆕 New Feature
Only on SakhiFi

Signature features you won't find anywhere else

These aren't just features. They're what makes SakhiFi unlike anything else out there.

🧬

Financial Personality Analysis

Sakhi learns your money patterns and assigns you a financial personality — Saver, Spender, Planner, or Investor — then customizes every suggestion to match.

Proprietary AI Model
👩

Women Financial Safety Mode

A dedicated protection layer that monitors for financial abuse patterns, coercive payment requests, and unsafe financial relationships — designed for women's safety.

India-First Feature
🔍

Scam Risk Detection Engine

Our ML engine trained on 10,000+ Indian scam patterns. Detects fake job offers, UPI fraud, phishing, and Ponzi schemes before you fall victim.

98.4% Accuracy
💡

Personalized Income Opportunities

Based on your skills, schedule, and location, Sakhi recommends exactly how to earn more — from content creation to tutoring to micro-gigs.

Skill-Matched
🎮

Gamified Financial Growth

XP points, streaks, badges, and a progression system that makes managing money genuinely fun. Level up from Student to Independent to Investor.

10x Engagement
Scam Shield™

Stop scams before they cost you everything

Indian students lose hundreds of crores annually to targeted financial scams. Sakhi's AI is trained to detect them in real time.

Scam Detection Active

"Congratulations! You've won a ₹50,000 scholarship. Send ₹500 registration fee to UPI ID xyz@ybl to claim. Offer expires in 1 hour."

Sakhi Alert: High-Risk Scam Detected

This matches 4 known scholarship scam patterns. Legitimate scholarships never require payment. Do NOT send money.

Flagged and blocked for your safety
📱

Fake UPI Requests

QR codes and payment links designed to drain your account

💼

Fake Internship Offers

Lucrative job offers that ask for registration fees upfront

🏦

KYC Fraud

Fake bank representatives asking to verify account details

🎓

Scholarship Scams

Too-good-to-be-true scholarships that harvest your personal data

💰

Loan Trap Apps

Predatory lending apps with hidden charges and data theft

🎰

Investment Fraud

Fake trading schemes promising guaranteed returns

₹3,200 Cr+ lost by Indian students to financial fraud annually. Sakhi is trained to stop all known patterns.

🌸 Period Wellness

Your cycle, your budget, perfectly in sync

Sakhi understands that wellness isn't generic. It tracks your cycle, manages cravings, and plans budget-friendly self-care — so you never have to choose between comfort and savings.

🔄

Cycle-Aware Budgeting

Sakhi adjusts your spending recommendations based on where you are in your cycle.

🍫

Craving Manager

Log cravings and get budget-friendly healthy alternatives that satisfy without overspending.

🧘

Self-Care Budget

Auto-allocated self-care budget that scales with your cycle — guilt-free comfort spending, planned ahead.

💊

Wellness Reminders

Timely reminders for supplements, hydration goals, and comfort items before symptoms peak.

📊

Mood-Expense Insights

Correlates spending patterns with cycle phases — understand your money personality better.

Period Wellness

Cycle Day 14 • Ovulation Phase

🌸

🍫 Chocolate🧁 Sweet🍿 Salty☕ Caffeine🍦 Cold

₹45

₹15

Banana Smoothie

Budget-Fit

Self-care shouldn't break the bank

Sakhi plans your comfort purchases ahead of time, so emotional spending never catches you off guard. Budget-friendly wellness, automated.

🍫 Cravings Tracked💊 Supplements Planned🧘 Self-Care Budgeted📊 Mood-Spend Insights

73%

reduced impulse spending

🩺 Health Agent

Prevention is the best investment

Sakhi tracks preventive checkups, forecasts medical expenses, and builds a health budget that keeps you healthy and financially secure.

🩸

Complete Blood Count

Yearly₹400-800

Essential baseline test. Detects anaemia (common in students), infections, and nutritional deficiencies early.

🦷

Dental Checkup

Every 6 months₹300-500

Preventive dental care costs 10x less than treatment. Catches cavities before they become root canals.

👁️

Eye Examination

Yearly₹200-400

Screen time damage is real. Annual exams catch digital eye strain and prescription changes early.

🫀

Thyroid & Vitamin Panel

Yearly₹600-1200

Thyroid disorders and Vitamin D/B12 deficiency are extremely common in young Indians. Early detection = easy management.

🧠

Mental Health Check-in

As needed₹500-1500

Student life is stressful. Regular mental health check-ins help you build resilience and catch burnout early.

🏥

Medical Expense Forecaster

Plan ahead, not panic

Sakhi estimates your annual health costs and builds a medical micro-fund — so a ₹2,000 dental bill never becomes an emergency.

🍎

Nutrition on a Budget

Healthy ≠ Expensive

Get meal suggestions that balance nutrition and affordability. Sakhi finds the cheapest sources of protein, iron, and vitamins near your campus.

Health AI Chat

I've been getting frequent headaches and feeling tired a lot lately

Sakhi Health AI

That sounds concerning. Based on your profile, I'd suggest a Vitamin D + B12 panel (₹600-800). You haven't had one in 14 months. Common in students with limited sun exposure. Want me to add it to your health budget?
Yes, and find an affordable clinic nearby

Sakhi Health AI

Found 3 labs near your campus. Best value: HealthKart Lab — ₹599 for full panel, 0.8km away. I've set aside ₹600 from your flex budget this week. 📋

₹2,000 in prevention saves ₹20,000 in treatment

Students who follow preventive health schedules spend 12x less on medical emergencies. Sakhi automates this for you.

₹2.4L

Annual savings

12×

Cheaper than crisis

📈 Investment Advisor

Start investing with just ₹500/month

Warren Buffett-level investment wisdom, simplified for every student's budget. Sakhi guides you from your first SIP to building real wealth.

SIP Power Calculator

Small amounts, massive results

MonthlyDurationInvestedReturns
₹5005 yrs₹30,000₹41,200
₹1,00010 yrs₹1,20,000₹2,32,000
₹2,00015 yrs₹3,60,000₹10,14,000
₹5,00020 yrs₹12,00,000₹49,95,000

* Assuming 12% avg annual returns (Nifty 50 historical)

“

The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now. Start with ₹500 — compound interest will do the heavy lifting.

— Adapted from Warren Buffett's wisdom

Sakhi's Take

Starting a ₹500/month SIP at age 18 gives you a 7-year head start over someone who starts at 25. That head start alone can mean ₹15L+ more at retirement. Time is your biggest asset.

Level up your finances, one XP at a time

Managing money should be fun. Earn XP, unlock badges, climb levels, and build habits that last.

Financial Literacy

Learn money in the context of your actual life

Not textbook theory. Real lessons about real topics that affect you right now — delivered in plain language, when you need them.

Banking Basics

  • How interest really works
  • Savings vs Current accounts
  • Understanding your salary slip
  • When to use a credit card

Investing 101

  • What is a SIP?
  • Index funds explained
  • Risk vs return
  • Starting with ₹500/month

Tax & Insurance

  • Income tax basics
  • Health insurance for students
  • Why term insurance matters
  • 80C deductions

Digital Safety

  • UPI safety rules
  • Reading a credit report
  • Loan traps to avoid
  • Safe online shopping

Lessons are bite-sized, accessible, and designed to take under 5 minutes. No financial background required.

Simple Start

From signup to financial clarity in four steps

No spreadsheets. No complexity. Just clear, actionable guidance from day one.

👤01

Tell Sakhi About Yourself

Share your college, monthly allowance, existing expenses, and financial goals. Sakhi builds your personal financial profile in minutes.

01
✨02

Get Your Personalized Plan

Sakhi generates a smart budget, savings targets, and a scam-awareness checklist — all tailored to your life, not a template.

02
💬03

Chat, Ask, Decide

Ask anything anytime. "Is this UPI link safe?" "Can I buy these shoes?" "How do I start a SIP?" Sakhi answers with context and care.

03
📈04

Watch Your Financial Health Grow

Track progress toward goals, celebrate milestones, and build the money habits that will serve you for life — starting now.

04
Privacy & Safety

Built for women, with women-first privacy

Financial privacy is personal safety. We built SakhiFi with the understanding that women face unique risks — from financial surveillance to data exploitation. Our architecture is designed to protect you.

End-to-End Encryption

Your financial data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Not even our team can read your personal information.

Zero Data Selling

We will never sell your data to advertisers, banks, or third parties. Your information stays yours, always.

You Own Your Data

Download all your data at any time. Delete your account completely — including all associated data — with one tap.

No Third-Party Tracking

We don't embed surveillance-grade trackers. Your behavior on SakhiFi is not sold to ad networks.

Judgment-Free Zone

Ask any financial question without shame. Sakhi never judges past decisions — only helps you build a better future.

Data Minimization

We only collect what's necessary. If we don't need it to serve you, we don't collect it.

Honest transparency: No system is completely unhackable. We use industry-standard security practices and continuously audit our systems. We will notify you promptly in the event of any breach affecting your data.

Why SakhiFi

Nothing else is built like this

Feature
SakhiFi
Other Apps
Built specifically for students
Women-first privacy design
Scam detection & alerts
AI conversation (ask anything)
"Can I afford this?" assistant
Indian context (UPI, SIP, INR)
Zero data selling
Varies
Financial literacy lessons
Limited
Student Stories

Real students, real transformation

From first login to daily habits — hear from students who tested SakhiFi.

"SakhiFi helped me save ₹18,000 in three months without feeling deprived. The scam alerts alone saved me from a fake internship scheme."

AS

Ananya Sharma

3rd Year, B.Tech CSE · IIT Delhi

"I finally understand where my money goes. Sakhi is like a financially savvy best friend who never judges you for buying that coffee."

PN

Priya Nair

MBA Student · IIM Bangalore

"The 'Can I afford this?' feature is everything. I use it before every purchase now. It's changed how I think about money completely."

MP

Meera Patel

2nd Year, B.Com · SRCC Delhi

"As a medical student with almost no time, Sakhi automates my financial planning. The privacy features give me peace of mind too."

RK

Riya Krishnan

Final Year, MBBS · AIIMS Jodhpur

Start your financial glow-up today

Join 50,000+ students building smarter money habits with AI. Your financial independence journey starts with one step.

Sign up freeLog inSee How It Works

No credit card required · Free for students · Cancel anytime

Get started

Meet Sakhi with your email

Sign up with email and a password, verify your inbox, then finish a short Sakhi chat — money and wellness tips tailored to you, including optional cycle-aware support.

Create accountLog in

Prefer no password? On the log-in page you can use a one-time magic link instead. Turn on email confirmation in Supabase Auth for verified sign-ups.

Get in Touch

We'd love to hear from you

Whether you're a student, educator, investor, or just curious — reach out. We read every message.

Email Us

hello@sakhifi.com

FAQ

Questions we hear often

SakhiFi is built with women students as the primary audience, with safety and privacy features designed around their specific needs. However, any student can use and benefit from the platform.

SakhiFi

The AI Financial Coach for Students. AI-powered financial coaching built for Indian students.
